name: Cheerleader
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player: until dusk, their ability works twice.
firstNightReminder: The Cheerleader might choose a player. If necessary, wake the chosen player, show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & the Cheerleader token. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Cheerleader might choose a player. If necessary, wake the chosen player, show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & the Cheerleader token. :reminder:
